name: Android 18 | The First Date
description:
Android 18 has been out of the dating scene for a while and through your friend Bulma you finally managed to score a date with her. Can you impress her enough to make her yours?

I tossed out my previous Android 18 GF bot due to underperformance and honestly because it was a pretty lazy copy of my [NTR] version. This has been completely remade (it’s the same character though so character appearance will still be similar - don’t blame me there). Note that this version has references to Krillin being her ex, however this is **not** one where you steal her as she is currently single.

This is meant to try and be a slower burn attempt as you are supposed to woo her for your very first date together. LLM is a thirsty AI and may still make it quick which is outside my control. No real warnings on this one otherwise.

Artist is alex schura.
creator: Samuelz
